candidate_targets.label: stout-smeared gauge configuration
candidate_targets.summary: The request likely refers to the narrow local stout-smear gauge-output path, but the exact smearing family is still inferred from rough wording and the local smear test also demonstrates APE and HYP variants.

candidate_targets.label: APE-smeared gauge configuration
candidate_targets.summary: The local smear test also contains an APE-smear path, but this repository does not yet implement it as a runnable supported family.

candidate_targets.label: HYP-smeared gauge configuration
candidate_targets.summary: The local smear test also contains a HYP-smear path, but this repository does not yet implement it as a runnable supported family.

external_lookup.reason: External lookup is disabled by default. Re-run with --enable-external-lookup to allow live online lookup.

formula_proposals.convention: Follow the narrow local PyQUDA path: read a Chroma/QIO gauge, copy it, apply stoutSmear(1, 0.241, 3), and save the smeared gauge as npy.
formula_proposals.correlator: Gauge-field transformation only; no hadron correlator is formed in this workflow.
formula_proposals.label: One-step stout-smeared gauge configuration

formula_proposals.convention: The local PyQUDA smear test demonstrates an APE-smeared gauge path via gauge.copy() -> apeSmearChroma(1, 2.5, 4), but the current grounded workflow catalog does not yet ship a complete runnable APE-smear output family.
formula_proposals.correlator: Gauge-field transformation only; no hadron correlator is formed in this workflow.
formula_proposals.label: One-step APE-smeared gauge configuration

formula_proposals.convention: The local PyQUDA smear test demonstrates a HYP-smeared gauge path via gauge.copy() -> hypSmear(1, 0.75, 0.6, 0.3, 4), but the current grounded workflow catalog does not yet ship a complete runnable HYP-smear output family.
formula_proposals.correlator: Gauge-field transformation only; no hadron correlator is formed in this workflow.
formula_proposals.label: One-step HYP-smeared gauge configuration

inferred_interpretation.label: stout-smeared gauge configuration
inferred_interpretation.summary: The request likely refers to the narrow local stout-smear gauge-output path, but the exact smearing family is still inferred from rough wording and the local smear test also demonstrates APE and HYP variants.

live_online_lookup.note: Live online lookup is opt-in and only used when local PyQUDA evidence is insufficient for the physics-side target definition.

local_curated_citations.note: Curated local JSON citations are available and may be attached to the physics artifact or implementation plan.

model_inference.note: Model inference may be used for normalization or formula/operator explanation when an LLM backend is configured.

true_online_lookup.note: Legacy boundary label retained for compatibility. The active opt-in capability is recorded under knowledge_boundary.live_online_lookup.

llm_assistance.codex_preflight_reason: Codex backend failed during local app-client initialization in the current environment.
llm_assistance.fallback_reason: Explicit codex backend failed preflight (Codex backend failed during local app-client initialization in the current environment.), so the run will use the rule-based path.
llm_assistance.selection_reason: Explicit codex backend failed short preflight and fell back to rules.

normalized_request: please smear this gauge field and save the result
user_request: please smear this gauge field and save the result
